reports.incident_description: New neonatal infusion pumps delivered to NICU; require acceptance testing, electrical safety check, and calibration before use.
Portable suction unit in ETU loses vacuum after 2 minutes; started after morning drizzle, possible moisture ingress in tubing or canister seals.
MRI room RF-door interlock intermittently fails and aborted two scans; request urgent inspection of door switch and shielding continuity.
Defibrillator self-test showing energy calibration fail; please calibrate and certify before morning rounds.
OT 2 diathermy unit footswitch sticking intermittently; risk of unintended coagulation, needs inspection and function test before afternoon list.
UPS in Pathology Lab beeping with high battery temperature alarm after brief rain; need check on fans, batteries, and load to protect analyzers.
DR panel dock shows moisture warning; small roof drip noted near charging bay after short rain. Request drying, inspection, and safety test.
New dialysis machine delivered; needs commissioning with electrical safety test and RO water interface verification before first patient.
Ventilator shows flow sensor fault after filter change; please troubleshoot and recalibrate to resume ventilation.
ECG trolley earth pin loose; patient reported tingling on metal rail. Need leakage test and plug top replacement.
Incubator humidity control overshooting; condensation inside hood noted in today’s humid conditions. Please recalibrate sensor and check seals.
Portable ultrasound probe intermittently disconnects after shifting between clinics during evening rain; suspect connector pins. Needs inspection.
Theatre 3 anaesthesia gas scavenging monitor not zeroing; likely sensor drift with today’s dry air. Calibrate before morning list.
Autoclave chart recorder not tracing; verify temperature/pressure sensors and recorder before further cycles.
Bedside monitor SpO2 channel flatlines intermittently since morning drizzle; probable moisture in extension cable. Request replacement/check.
Main theatre isolation transformer alarm for high leakage current after damp morning; urgent insulation and earth continuity testing needed.
New patient monitors from MSD lack EtCO2 as per spec; request Biomed evaluation and advice on acceptance or return.
TENS units due for annual calibration and safety testing; please schedule preventive maintenance.
Blood bank refrigerator showing temp fluctuations and alarms overnight; request sensor calibration and condenser coil cleaning.
CT injector footswitch unresponsive; contrast list at 1 pm. Need immediate repair or a loaner unit.
ETU defibrillator pads connector latch broken; require connector repair and advice on compatible pad stock.
Central oxygen blender alarm for low inlet pressure though pipeline normal; possible internal filter damp due to today’s rain; please inspect.
Fetal doppler noisy and cutting out after afternoon rain; suspect cable or probe moisture. Needs check and functional test.
Ultrasound therapy units due for electrical safety testing; previous stickers expired. Request certification.
Multiple syringe pumps with noisy plunger drive and uneven rates; please perform PM and calibration before weekend chemo drips.
Ventilator at ICU Bed 2 throws 'flow sensor error' on power-up; patient shifted to backup. Please troubleshoot and recalibrate today.
Anaesthesia workstation in Theatre 1 showing O2 analyzer drift >5%; need calibration before afternoon list.
Portable X-ray unit battery trolley beeping; charger indicator dead, unit not taking charge. Request inspection and battery/charger test.
OPD ECG showing heavy mains hum; suspect loose earth/plug issue. Please perform electrical safety test and rectify.
Incubator #3 humidity control overshooting to 85% this evening (very humid outside). Kindly check sensor and recalibrate.
Dialyzer #2 conductivity alarm fluctuating though RO reads stable; please verify calibration and temperature probe.
Wall suction at ETU Bay 4 not holding negative pressure; likely regulator diaphragm tear. Need urgent fix during resus.
MRI room reporting gradient cabinet over-temp after evening drizzle; humidity high. Please check chiller flow and interface alarms before next scan.
OT light in Theatre 3 flickers and dims after 10 minutes; driver likely overheating. Please repair before list resumes.
Benchtop centrifuge (Serology) lid interlock not engaging; unit won't start. Request swift repair.
PPM due: stickers expired on six syringe pumps (5A). Kindly schedule preventative maintenance this week.
TENS/IF combo unit output irregular; patient felt sudden spikes. Please safety-test and recalibrate channels.
After thundershowers, Cath Lab UPS shifted to bypass and battery alarm active. Request Biomed to test batteries and restore normal mode.
Vaccine fridge showing 10°C; gasket loose and temp drifting with morning heat. Vaccines moved to backup. Please repair and verify calibration.
Defibrillator in CCU Bed 1 failed self-test; charge not reaching set energy. Likely capacitor fault. Urgent service required.
Abdominal US probe intermittently disconnects; suspect connector oxidised (sea breeze today). Please clean contacts and test.
Tingling felt touching patient monitor cart; possible leakage current/earthing issue. Request immediate electrical safety check.
Autoclave #1 not achieving 134°C, stalls at 129°C; morning rain increased condensate. Sterilization backlog—urgent attention.
Infusion pump on Bed 12 gives intermittent 'occlusion' though line patent; pressure sensor likely out of calibration. Please check.
Request Biomed technical evaluation of three quotations for two portable suction units for ETU—spec compliance and service terms review needed.
Platelet agitator speed unstable and noisy; fear bearing failure affecting agitation rate. Please service today.
Phototherapy unit Bed K irradiance low despite new tubes; kindly measure with radiometer and calibrate or replace ballast.
Compressed-air dryer in plant room got wet after gusty shower; theatres receiving low pressure alarms. Need urgent restoration and safety check.
Orthopaedic drill battery pack swollen; charger overheating. Please isolate, replace battery, and test charger.
New infant warmer delivered; request installation, acceptance testing (ES/functional), and brief user orientation today.
Power dip triggered MRI chiller high-temp alarm; scanner in standby. Please check cooling loop, UPS logs, and restart protocol.
Defibrillator failed self-test after flicker; battery shows ‘replace’. Need battery verification and energy output check before night shift.
Endoscopy stack lost power; ELCB tripped and moisture noted near socket. Request insulation/leakage tests and safe restoration.
Incubator humidity sensor spiking to 95% after morning shower; alarms frequent. Please recalibrate sensor and check humidifier module.
Portable X-ray battery charger tripped ELCB post-rain; faint hot smell. Request isolation test on charger and cable before reuse.
RO plant conductivity fluctuating since last night’s rain; HD sessions delayed. Need probe calibration and prefilter/carbon check.
Smoke evacuator trips mid-case after filter change in humid theatre. Please test PSU/earth leakage and certify for afternoon list.
Request BME technical evaluation of quotes for two anaesthesia monitors; need compatibility review with existing gas modules and network.
After heavy rain, main autoclave shows vacuum leak alarm; won’t reach setpoint. Please inspect door gasket, run leak test, and recalibrate.
Two portable suction machines cutting out; cords warm and filters damp after downpour. Need motor check, hose replacement, and PAT.
Chiller approach temp rising and system near thermal shutdown. Request coil/condensor cleaning and coolant level check.
Power fluctuation; one ventilator rebooted despite UPS. Patient bagged briefly. Need UPS load test and internal battery replacement check.
Surgical lights flicker; dimmer unstable. Please inspect driver PSU and isolation transformer in OT panel.
Routine PM overdue on nebulizers and wall suction regulators in OPD; heavy clinic load. Request scheduling and calibration tags this week.
Washer-disinfector trips ELCB during heat cycle. Need heater element insulation test and earth continuity verification.
Refrigerated centrifuge overheating mid-run; hot bearing smell on this very hot morning. Please service fan, bearings, and recalibrate RPM.
Ultrasound image intermittently drops; rear fan noisy in heat. Request filter cleaning, probe connector reseat, and QA phantom test.
ECG trolley plug top earth pin broken; using temporary extension. Replace plug, test earth continuity, and label safe today.
Phototherapy unit shows low irradiance on meter; one tube darkened. Please replace tubes and verify output at set distance.
Electrosurgical unit intermittently alarms ‘return plate’; gel adequate. Check REM circuit, cable, and provide service spare.
Two TENS units with irregular output; scratchy knobs and frayed leads. Need output calibration, lead replacement, and safety test.
Digital BP machine shows ‘Err’; cuff bladder leaking and pump noisy. Request quick repair or swap before evening clinic.
CT contrast injector footswitch sticking; risk of unintended run. Please replace switch and verify injection calibration.
NICU UPS beeping and on bypass, monitors on mains. Need battery test, bypass cause analysis, and insulation checks.
Chemistry analyzer leaking at chiller manifold; damp near power strip after humid morning. Please isolate, replace tubing, and safety test.
Six syringe pumps received at store; require installation, calibration, and acceptance testing before issue to ICU.
Defibrillator failed daily self-test; battery shows over-temp warning in the heat. Request functional check and battery analyzer run.
Portable X-ray trips MCB during exposure and shows kV drift. Please safety-test and recalibrate.
ICU ventilator delivering inconsistent VT after brief power fluctuation. Verify flow sensor and alarm limits before next case.
Rain leak dripped onto ward monitor trolley; device powered off. Need drying protocol, insulation resistance, and safety clearance.
Autoclave aborts at 121°C; temperature probe oscillating. Please service and recalibrate today.
Centrifuge vibrating with faint burning smell after the brief downpour. Check bearings, motor brushes, and balance sensor.
Main Theatre UPS beeping—input fault after lightning; running on battery during case. Need urgent diagnostics and transfer load check.
CT chiller alarm: high condenser temp post-storm; scanner in standby. Please inspect chiller/pumps and manage safe restart.
Quarterly PM for anaesthesia machines overdue. Request full preventive maintenance and leak/flow calibration across 5 theatres.
Incubator humidity sensor stuck at 99% after storm; condensation inside hood. Need sensor calibration/replacement and safety check.
RO plant conductivity trending high; pre-filters show pressure drop. Please test and replace cartridges before morning sessions.
OPD ECG gives noisy traces; wall socket earth pin loose. Need socket fix and electrical safety test before clinic resumes.
Minor Theatre suction unit stopped mid-procedure; hot smell after rain-related fluctuation. Require immediate swap and repair.
New ward glucometers need installation, QC with control solutions, and user verification logs before rollout.
Portable ultrasound head overheating; output irregular. Please calibrate and perform leakage/earth safety tests.
Lightning spike this evening: two infusion pumps show 'motor stall'. Need urgent inspection and loaners tonight.
Blood bank fridge fluctuating between 2–8°C post-storm; compressor short-cycling. Verify sensors/alarms and fit data logger.
Request specs and compatibility advice for diathermy pencils and patient plates for Valleylab Force FXc units.
Main Theatre diathermy footswitch intermittently unresponsive—possible moisture ingress. Check cable/connector and insulation.
MRI suite shows condensation near RF door. Need chiller/cold head safety check and dehumidification before list.
Twelve new bedside monitors require earth-bond tests and acceptance documentation before handover.
Endoscopy light source flickers; xenon lamp near end of life. Please confirm lamp hours, advise procurement, and replace.
After intense rain, DR panel battery not charging; dock LED flickers. Clean contacts and test charger/pack.
Pendant arm earth continuity failed during pre-list check (reading >0.2Ω). Please rectify and certify before cases.
ICU UPS switched to battery twice; ventilator and syringe pumps briefly reset. Please check earthing, input stability, and UPS logs.
MRI chiller raised a moisture/high RH alarm after heavy rain; intermittent trips observed. Request inspection, dehumidification, and chiller control check.
RO plant conductivity spiked to 25 µS/cm after waterlogging near pre-filters. Dialysis on hold—please recalibrate sensor and change pre-filters.
Defibrillator not charging post-thunder; charger shows error and faint burnt smell. Need immediate bench test and charger board repair.
New infusion pumps delivered. Kindly perform acceptance testing, leakage current checks, and calibration before issue to wards.
Anaesthesia machine FiO2 drifts by −6% since the storm; likely O2 cell moisture/aging. Please calibrate or replace cell before afternoon list.
Blood bank fridge recorded 7.8°C for 10 minutes during squally winds; compressor short-cycling. Check UPS output, thermostat, and download logger.
Incubator RH remains ~75% despite 60% setpoint after widespread rain. Request humidity sensor calibration and chamber seal check.
Portable X-ray shows generator fault E-17; suspect moisture in HV cable after rains. Need insulation resistance test and drying/service.
Theatre 1 suction regulator dial stuck at 200 mmHg; gauge cracked. Please replace/regulate before next case starts.
After the downpour/outage, central monitor not pulling waveforms from Beds 3–6; bedside units OK. Kindly check the biomed network switch/PoE.
Quarterly calibration pending for OPD BP sets and weighing scales; audit this week. Please schedule PM and update calibration stickers.
Autoclave failed Bowie-Dick and vacuum leak tests; door gasket worn. Sterilization release at risk—request gasket replacement and re-test.
RF door not latching flush; noise floor up ~6 dB with today’s humidity. Please realign hinges and replace RF gasket.
Therapeutic ultrasound output ~30% low on meter; patients report less warmth. Request recalibration and transducer check.
Ventilator alarming high peak pressure; expiratory valve sticking after storms. Immediate valve service/replacement required—patient at risk.
Theatre 2 OT lights flicker since generator changeover; LIM shows 3 mA. Please verify isolation transformer and earth reference.
Portable suction unit battery dies <3 minutes after full charge; heavy rain all day. Need battery replacement and function test for resus readiness.
OPD glucometers show inconsistent control results (±30 mg/dL). Please run QC, recalibrate, and verify strip lot integrity.
Leak from ceiling wet the stack trolley extension; faint smoke smell. Request PAT/electrical safety test and replacement with medical-grade board.
UPS shows ‘battery temp high’ and ‘charger fault’ after intense thunder; cases paused. Need urgent inspection and load test.
New patient monitors for Ward 7B need acceptance and electrical safety checks; two units flagged high leakage on prelim test.
Radiant warmer heater cycles erratically; skin probe reading jumps in humid, windy conditions. Replace thermistor/probe and recalibrate.
Diathermy shows ‘HF neutral fault’ intra-op; pad cable visually intact. Need immediate check of return electrode monitoring circuit.
Please evaluate quotations for syringe pumps and advise on standard specs, vendor support, and AMC before raising LPO.
PB840 ventilator in ICU Bed 3 shows O2 cell drift and fails auto-cal; please recalibrate/replace sensor and verify alarms.
MRI RF room humidity at 72% by wall hygrometer; slight condensation near waveguide; request dehumidifier service and door sweep seal check.
OPD defib (Mindray) failed self-test with 'Charge Fault'; UPS beeped during sudden rain burst; urgent repair and safety check required.
Anaesthesia workstation (GE Aisys) O2 flow sensor intermittently erratic post-thunderstorm; recalibration and leak test needed before afternoon list.
NICU radiant warmer overshooting setpoint by +1.5°C; please calibrate servo probe and verify PID settings.
Dialysis RO panel conductivity reading unstable; suspect grounding/moisture after downpour; need immediate inspection before next session.
Haematology centrifuge trips imbalance sensor even on balanced loads; request calibration of tachometer and vibration sensor.
Portable X-ray battery pack swollen and warm; please isolate, evaluate charger, and provide replacement battery.
ETU monitor (Bed 6) SpO2 channel intermittently flat; new sensor tried; likely module fault—request board-level check.
CSSD autoclave failed Bowie–Dick twice; vacuum leak suspected at door gasket; need ASAP service to resume packs.
Several TENS/IF units in Physio lack valid electrical safety stickers; request leakage-current tests and tagging.
Surgical ward infusion pumps: PM overdue on 5 units; two new pumps delivered today need incoming inspection, calibration, and asset tagging.
ICU syringe pump alarming 'High Occlusion' at low rates; occlusion pressure seems out of spec; please recalibrate.
Main OT ceiling light intermittently flickers during strong winds; check driver, mounting, and earth bonding before evening list.
Blood bank fridge logged temperature spikes during thunder burst; verify sensor calibration, compressor health, and UPS performance; stock at risk.
Dental chair gives slight tingling on armrest; urgent electrical safety test and earthing verification needed.
CT injector foot pedal non-responsive after early downpour; suspected water ingress at connector; urgent repair to avoid delays.
NICU blender O2/air selector stiff; flow readings drift; request calibration and service.
Ventilator tender query: vendor specifies 16A sockets and 800 VA per unit; need BMEU advice on power, plug type, and UPS compatibility before bid closes.
OPD ECG trolley earth pin broken; chassis not earthed—please replace plug, perform safety test, and tag.
Physio gel warmer overheating; thermostat likely stuck—inspect and calibrate to prevent burns.
ICU wall suction regulators reading low by ~20 mmHg; request bench calibration and leak check.
Fluoroscopy bay UPS beeping on bypass since storm; batteries weak—please test, replace, and load-verify.
Eye theatre phaco handpiece overheating alert at low power; check handpiece calibration, cooling, and footswitch cable.
Main OT diathermy shows 'Return Electrode Fault' despite new pads; inspect REM circuit, patient plate cable, and earth bonding—procedure on hold.
Portable suction unit losing vacuum intermittently; vacuum drops from -500 to -200 mmHg and gauge flickers. Request check of pump, tubing seals, and safety testing.
Warmer bed B tripped the RCCB twice; power bar feels warm. Please inspect insulation, replace socket if damp, and perform electrical safety test.
New anaesthesia workstation delivered last night; surgery list pending acceptance test and gas leak check. Need installation, calibration, and sign-off before 8:30.
DR panel battery not charging; dock shows solid red and panel powers off mid-exam. Please check charger contacts and cell health.
Two HD machines displayed 'temp sensor fault' after brief power dip during rain; treatments delayed. Need inspection, electrical safety, and recalibration before next shift.
ECG machine prints very faint traces; thermal head seems misaligned and paper sticks in humid clinic. Please service and recalibrate print density.
Ventilator in Bed 3 alarms 'expiratory leak/flow sensor error' post thunderstorm flicker; backup running. Request immediate check, flow sensor calibration, and battery test.
ABG analyzer chamber temp unstable; UPS alarmed after midday lightning. Need stabilizer/UPS verification and instrument calibration check.
Ultrasound therapy unit outputs low at 1.0 W/cm2 setting; patients report no warmth. Please calibrate output and inspect applicator cable.
Main autoclave leaking steam at door; cycle aborts near 121C. Require gasket replacement, pressure test, and safety interlock check.
Crash trolley defibrillator failed self-test (battery fault, pads not detected). Needs battery replacement, pad port check, and function verification now.
Preventive maintenance overdue on 8 syringe pumps (stickers expired May). Kindly schedule PM and electrical safety testing this week.
CT injector footswitch intermittently dead; suspect cable damage after corridor leak yesterday. Please test continuity and replace footswitch if needed; ensure earthing.
MRI chiller alarm 'high water temp' and UPS on beeper after rain-related power dips; gradients disabled. Urgent triage with vendor and cooling checks requested.
Capnograph readings erratic; water trap full and sample pump noisy. Need calibration, water trap replacement, and leak test before first case.
Dental chair compressor trips on thermal cutout; moisture trap leaking in humid room. Request service, drain filter replacement, and pressure switch calibration.
Fetal Doppler audio cuts off; cable frayed near probe entry. Please replace cable/probe and perform electrical safety test tonight.
Nebulizer compressor output weak (<6 L/min), delaying paediatric cases. Need flow calibration and filter change.
Bed 6 monitor shows 'mains earth leakage' and slight tingle at rail after night rain; headwall outlet damp. Urgent isolation and safety tests required.
Slit lamp illumination flickers; 230V adaptor humming since gusty rain. Please test PSU, replace failing transformer, and verify earthing.
Request technical evaluation and acceptance testing plan for 15 infusion pumps under new tender; need spec compliance with SLS/IEC before LPO.
Syringe pump gives frequent false occlusion alarms at 1 mL/hr and 3 mL/hr; line is patent. Please recalibrate occlusion sensor and update alarm limits.
Portable X-ray tripped circuit during thunder; burning smell from 13A plug-top. Need immediate PAT, cord/plug replacement, and insulation test.
Phototherapy unit irradiance down to 6 uW/cm2/nm on meter; infants jaundiced. Replace tubes, clean reflectors, and re-measure before use.
Body composition analyzer shows erratic impedance and 'cal error.' Please calibrate, check electrode pads, and verify scale zero.
Bedside patient monitor intermittently loses SpO2 reading; cables changed but issue persists. Please check module and recalibrate before ward round.
During brief thunder, NICU UPS kept beeping and some monitors reset. Request battery test and mains conditioning check.
Diathermy unit shows earth-fault alarm when power increased; likely moisture ingress after afternoon rain. Need immediate safety test and repair.
New infusion pumps delivered for Paediatrics. Please conduct acceptance testing, asset tagging, and commissioning today if possible.
Portable X-ray charger trolley smells hot; fans not running after brief thunder. Kindly inspect charger PSU before night duty.
Syringe pump shows rate drift by ~2 ml/hr against manual calc. Request calibration and verification report.
Autoclave failed vacuum leak test; heavy rain today and condensate seen at trap. Need seal replacement and revalidation.
Defibrillator shows 'check pads' even with new electrodes; shock advisory delayed. Please test ECG input and energy output ASAP.
Infant warmer overshooting to 38°C on set 36.5°C in today’s heat. Kindly calibrate skin probe and control loop.
ECG machine prints noisy tracings, 'mains interference' even on battery. Request check of leads and internal filtering.
OT capnograph baseline creeping up; suspect water trap sensor drift. Please recalibrate before afternoon list.
RO conductivity alarm trending high after thunder; dialysis machines pausing frequently. Need sensor check and interlock verification.
CT contrast injector touchscreen unresponsive post power flicker. Request PSU and controller board diagnosis.
Vaccine fridge logger shows noon spikes; probe may be misplaced or out of calibration. Please verify and re-calibrate.
New transport ventilator (donation) requires acceptance testing, electrical safety checks, and brief user orientation.
Ventilator humidifier chamber leaking; floor damp after gusty rain. Please replace seals and perform earth leakage test.
Central station shows 'network down' for Beds 3 & 4 since storm; bedside monitors local only. Kindly check switch/isolator and restore connectivity.
C-arm footswitch intermittently non-responsive; may be moisture ingress. Need check before first case.
Treadmill ECG halted mid-test with 'AC fault' during thundery rain. Please test RCD, line filter, and internal PSU.
Two nebulizer compressors rattling with poor flow; filters grimy. Request service and advise if replacement procurement is preferable.
Platelet incubator temp alarmed during afternoon thunder; airflow weak. Kindly check fan, thermistor, and re-calibrate.
New convex probe shows intermittent dropout lines; cable strain relief suspect. Please test and complete acceptance.
Shortwave diathermy emits burning smell and trips MCB after 10 minutes. Request insulation and capacitor checks; unit quarantined.
Syringe pump keypad intermittently unresponsive; likely salt-air corrosion with coastal breeze. Please service and swap unit.
MRI chiller alarming 'low flow' after heavy rain and mains flicker; scan list halted. Request pump/filter check and temperature verification; vendor coordination if needed.
Incubator showing temperature drift and humidity alarm since early morning; likely calibration offset due to muggy start. Please calibrate and verify alarms.
Syringe pump triggers false occlusion alarms at low rates; started after brief rain. Request sensor recalibration and full PM check.
Portable X-ray charger emitting hot smell; likely overheated with evening moisture. Please inspect, service cooling, and perform earth leakage test.
Defibrillator self-test failed: battery capacity below limit. Need battery replacement and verification tonight for resus readiness.
ECG printer output faint and intermittent; paper feed uneven. Request servicing, calibration, and safety check.
Anaesthesia workstation showing O2 sensor calibration error at startup. Please calibrate and perform gas leak test before afternoon list.
CT room UPS beeping and switching to battery during rain; suspect mains fluctuation. Need input filter check, runtime test, and mitigation advice.
Bedside monitor SpO2 values erratic despite cable change. Please verify probe calibration and run full monitor diagnostics.
Ventilator expiratory valve intermittently sticking in high humidity. Unit swapped; request urgent service and calibration.
Multiple infusion pumps show error E-11 and beeping. Please inspect, clear faults, and perform electrical safety tests.
MRI chiller alarmed 'High Inlet Temp' post-storm; scanner on standby. Need chiller filter check, glycol top-up, and power conditioning review.
CTG monitor baseline drifting; intermittent loss of toco trace. Request calibration of ultrasound/toco channels and due PM.
Autoclave failing Bowie-Dick; vacuum not reaching spec since intermittent rain. Please conduct leak test, sensor calibration, and cycle validation.
Dialysis machine conductivity trending high vs. meter. Need calibration cross-check and temperature probe verification before first session.
ESU footswitch cable frayed at strain relief; insulation compromised. Please replace and perform leakage/current safety tests.
During heavy rain, portable suction tripped RCD in Resus Bay. Suspect moisture ingress/earth fault. Require inspection and safety certification.
Phototherapy lamp intensity uneven across field; tubes okay. Request irradiance mapping and ballast/driver check.
Therapeutic ultrasound output fluctuating at 1 MHz setting. Need calibration, probe coupling test, and safety check.
Endoscopy stack light source fan noisy, unit heating up in humid ward. Please service cooling path and verify thermal cut-out.
Several Holter recorders with swollen batteries and loose covers in humidity. Request battery replacement and functional verification.
Bedside monitor network bridges down; trends not syncing. Need Biomed to test PoE injectors and restore connectivity.
Portable ventilator alarm 'O2 supply low' with full cylinder attached. Suspect internal regulator leak; bench test required tonight.
Drug fridge data logger shows +10°C peaks in hot, sticky weather. Please calibrate, check door seals, and advise on replacement options.
Centrifuge lid interlock error with faint burning smell after storm. Unit isolated. Request repair and electrical safety testing.
Capnograph showing ~3 mmHg offset across cases. Please perform calibration with reference gas and check sampling module.
After lightning, central monitor rebooted twice and two bedside monitors show noisy ECG. Please check power conditioning and perform electrical safety tests.
New tabletop autoclave from last week not reaching sterilization temp; need calibration and validation before minor procedures this afternoon.
Resus defibrillator failed self-test with 'energy calibration error'. Urgent verification and recalibration needed.
Wall socket near Bed 12 sparked when connecting patient monitor. Request earth-bond and leakage current test; replace outlet if faulty.
Portable X-ray battery trolley not charging; charger casing hot and smells of insulation. Please inspect and certify safe use.
Infant warmer shows ±1.5°C drift in servo mode; humidity very high in unit. Please recalibrate temp probe and verify control.
ESU/diathermy arcing at low settings; suspect return plate or calibration issue. Need functional and safety check before evening OT list.
Power dip with thunder; RO controller keeps rebooting, two dialysis machines show conductivity out of range. Please assess and recalibrate.
New syringe pumps received (10 units). Request acceptance testing, occlusion alarm verification, and accuracy checks before issue.
OT2 ventilator showing inconsistent tidal volumes; 'flow sensor fault' after evening storm. Need service before morning list.
Fridge 2 fluctuating beyond 2–6°C during persistent rain; controller not holding setpoint. Repair and 24-hour temperature mapping required.
Basement UPS room damp from all-day rain; one UPS beeping 'battery fault'. Request inspection, insulation resistance test, and load transfer plan.
Resus suction unit intermittently losing vacuum after brief rain burst; motor casing very warm. Please service/replace.
Therapeutic ultrasound output low compared to reference. Request calibration check and earth-bond test before OPD sessions.
Post-lightning, SpO2 modules on three beds showing frequent dropouts; likely cable/module failure. Need immediate assessment and swap-outs.
Bowie–Dick failed twice on steam sterilizer No.1. Please check for air leaks and recalibrate temp/pressure sensors.
Two nebulizer compressors weak flow; patients queued for clinic. Request preventive maintenance or replacements.
Bedside monitor over-reading NIBP by ~15 mmHg vs manual. Need calibration and cuff/line leak test.
Thunderstorms this evening; MRI chiller showing high temp and 'cooling capacity low'. Immediate check to prevent quench.
Anaesthesia machine OT3 due for quarterly PM today; can slot between lists. Please service and document leak/flow tests.
Haematology centrifuge vibrating at 3000 rpm; suspect rotor imbalance/bearing wear. Service and recalibration required.
During strong thunderstorm, two syringe pump channels reset mid-infusion; logs show 'power interrupt'. Please test pumps and isolation transformer.
ECG machine print faint; thermal head alignment off. Electrical safety tag expired as well. Request service and safety testing.
Request Biomed review of specs and vendor options for portable suction units, given recent storm-related failures in ETU.
ICU patient monitor hub lost link twice. Need Biomed to test PoE switch, check shielded cabling and grounding.
Diathermy cart tripped the RCD after heavy rain; water pooling near wall socket. Unit isolated. Request insulation test and earthing check before lists resume.
One incubator humidity probe reading 95-99% despite setpoint 60% after humid afternoon. Please recalibrate and inspect sensor housing for moisture ingress.
Autoclave A tripped ELCB mid-cycle; dampness noted around base after steady rain. Need electrical safety test and vacuum pump service.
MRI UPS switched to bypass twice during thunder showers. No current alarm but logs show voltage dips; request battery health and load test.
Portable X-ray battery charger running hot with electrical smell; extension board feels damp. Please PAT test and replace suspect leads.
RO plant conductivity spiked to 12 uS/cm during afternoon rain. Switched off water supply to machines. Need calibration and pre-filter inspection urgently.
Defibrillator failed self-test: energy low at 200J. Request bench testing, capacitor check, and verification with analyzer today.
Ultrasound therapy unit makes crackling noise; output fluctuates. Removed from service. Please inspect power stage and recalibrate.
Tabletop centrifuge vibrating excessively after brief power cut. Suspect rotor imbalance or bearing wear; need service before evening runs.
Resus bay patient monitor NIBP will not hold pressure; cuff and tubing changed. Likely internal valve leak; request immediate repair.
OT diathermy alarmed 'return electrode high impedance' twice during list. Please check plate cable, contact quality, and recalibrate unit.
Twenty syringe pumps received today. Require acceptance testing, asset tagging, and user orientation prior to ward issue.
Ventilator flagging flow-sensor moisture alarm since early morning humidity. Need sensor drying kit use and calibration verification.
CR reader overheats with 'temperature high' fault; filters visibly dusty after wet weather. Request internal cleaning and fan check.
Sevoflurane vaporiser due for annual calibration before OT 3 list. Please verify output concentration and perform leak test.
Two dialysis machines show 'mains fluctuation' during thunder. Request check of stabilisers, isolation transformer, and earthing bar.
Blood bank fridge peaked at 7.2 C overnight; chart recorder erratic. Need probe calibration, door seal inspection, and alarm verification.
Light source fan not spinning; unit overheats after rainy morning. Lists delayed. Please repair fan and verify light output.
Neonatal warmer touchscreen unresponsive after last night's generator changeover; fuses intact. Need board-level assessment.
Rainwater entered OPD minor theatre. Request immediate electrical safety testing for suction unit and diathermy before reopening.
Central monitoring station reboots repeatedly after ceiling drip. Bedside monitors OK. Need PSU and backplane inspection and drying.
Two portable suction units overdue for PM; one only achieves -200 mmHg. Please service and replace bacterial filters.
Request BME evaluation of quotes for a transport ventilator compatible with BS gas outlets and current circuits. Need recommendation by week end.
CT chiller shows 'low flow' alarm; outdoor strainer clogged with leaves after storm. Cleared surface debris; need full service and glycol check.
Diathermy return electrode cable insulation cracked causing intermittent alarms in OT 2. Request replacement and safety test.
Brief power dip during afternoon thunder left three NICU monitors running on battery; UPS beeping. Please check UPS load, battery health, and power rails before evening shift.
Anaesthesia workstation in OT2 showing erratic flow readings and water in gas line after humid morning; need sensor drying, calibration, and leak test.
Portable suction units show PM stickers expired in November; request routine maintenance and functional checks before clinic starts.
Main autoclave aborts at 126°C during sterilization phase; likely temp sensor or steam valve fault. Need repair and revalidation today.
New syringe pumps (10 units) received; require acceptance testing, electrical safety, and calibration before issuing to wards.
CR reader producing vertical banding artifacts after brief afternoon rain; please inspect scanner optics and calibrate detector.
After evening rain, UPS room for theatres has moisture near floor conduits; ELCB tripped once. Request earthing resistance check and UPS inspection before first case.
Defibrillator daily self-test failed; battery internal resistance high and energy delivery not verified. Need battery change and calibration urgently.
Two ultrasound therapy units borderline on leakage current during safety check; require PAT re-test and servicing before patient sessions.
MRI chiller alarm and gradient cabinet temp high after power sag during thunder; system in standby. Please stabilize power, check cooling, and liaise with vendor.
Portable suction trolley gives mild tingling on touch in damp corridor; plug top warm. Request electrical safety test and adapter replacement if needed.
ENT theatre requests operating microscope upgrade; need Biomed spec review (illumination, focal length, ceiling load) before tender.
Main OT surgical light head flickers intermittently after evening rain; suspect ballast or loose neutral in pendant. Please inspect before morning list.
Haemodialysis machine No. 4 shows conductivity drift ±0.6 mS/cm; failed calibration with standard. Request recalibration and sensor cartridge change.
Incubator in NNU bed 6 overshooting to 38.8°C at set 36.5°C; alarm muted earlier. Require immediate calibration and isolation from use.
During case in OT1, diathermy caused RCD to trip twice amid afternoon rain; likely moisture ingress at ceiling pendant. Need urgent insulation testing and repair.
Ventilator on Bed 3 delivering tidal volumes below set; suspect blocked flow sensor from humidifier condensate. Please service and verify calibration.
New blood bank refrigerator installed; requires 24-hour temperature mapping and alarm verification before stocking blood units.
OPD ECG prints faint; thermal head appears worn and paper feed uneven. Need head replacement and calibration before clinic.
SLMC audit due in January: request annual calibration and electrical safety testing schedule for OT multiparameter monitors.
Multiple syringe pumps giving false occlusion alarms after brief drizzle; lines patent. Likely door-latch pressure or sensor drift; please check and recalibrate.
Benchtop centrifuge vibrating with burning smell at 3000 rpm; rotor imbalance or bearing failure suspected. Request service and speed calibration.
Pre-vac autoclave failed Bowie-Dick this morning; suspected vacuum leak. Need gasket replacement, leak test, and cycle validation urgently.
TENS unit delivers sharp sensation at low setting; probable output stage fault and failed calibration. Please isolate and test.
Mobile C-arm image washed out and gain unstable during fracture fixation; need immediate image chain calibration or II replacement.
